description: Composition Black flat front trousers made of 65% polyester and 35% viscose, two pockets on the sides, two welt pockets on the back, button and zipped closure, belt loops at the waistband, brand badge above the right pocket and extended hems Fit Slim Wash care Machine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron Do not iron on decorations arrow is known for its no nonsense, classic, formal wear for men. This easy to wear, eternally in vogue pair balances conservative class with experimental modernism perfectly. Wear this with a crisp formal shirt and a tonal blazer for dressy occasions. Model statistics Product is a size 32 on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
